releases.name: v1.0.0-rc.3
releases.body:
# v1.0.0-rc.3

Porting all the changes that were made in PostgreSQL to other dialects. This release is about MySQL:

- Removed RQBv1 from `mysql` dialect (`._query`)
- Internal MySQL sessions refactoring and moving to a unified query preparation function
- Fallback to regular queries on iterators for drivers that don't support streaming instead of throwing an error for compatibility
- Enabled optimized non-jit mappers for regular queries for MySQL dialect
- Switched RQBv2 to array mode querying, disabled root query level JSON conversions
- Fixed MySQL proxy driver not using `lastInsertId`, `affectedRows` from dedicated response fields

Next releases will include:
- Effect MySQL support 
- SQLite rework (same as this release for MySQL)
- SQLite Effect Support

releases.name: v22.2.0-alpha.5
releases.body:
* [#2708](https://github.com/stripe/stripe-node/pull/2708) Update generated code for private-preview
  * Add support for new resources `V2.Core.FeeBatch`, `V2.Core.FeeEntry`, `V2.MoneyManagement.DebitDispute`, and `V2.MoneyManagement.FinancialAccountStatement`
  * Add support for `simulate_network_lifecycle_pre_arbitration_response` and `simulate_network_lifecycle_pre_arbitration_submission` test helper methods on resource `Issuing.Dispute`
  * Add support for `list` method on resource `PaymentLocation`
  * Add support for `list` and `retrieve` methods on resources `V2.Core.FeeBatch`, `V2.Core.FeeEntry`, and `V2.MoneyManagement.FinancialAccountStatement`
  * Add support for `create`, `list`, and `retrieve` methods on resource `V2.MoneyManagement.DebitDispute`
  * Add support for `discounts` on `DelegatedCheckout.RequestedSessionCreateParams`, `DelegatedCheckout.RequestedSessionUpdateParams`, and `DelegatedCheckout.RequestedSession`
  * Add support for `amount_sale` on `DelegatedCheckout.RequestedSession.line_item_details[]` and `DelegatedCheckout.RequestedSession.total_details`
  * Add support for `amount_discount` and `breakdown` on `DelegatedCheckout.RequestedSession.total_details`
  * ⚠️ Remove support for `check_deposit_address` on `Invoice.payment_settings.payment_method_options.check_scan`, `InvoiceCreateParams.payment_settings.payment_method_options.check_scan`, `InvoiceUpdateParams.payment_settings.payment_method_options.check_scan`, `QuotePreviewInvoice.payment_settings.payment_method_options.check_scan`, `Subscription.payment_settings.payment_method_options.check_scan`, `SubscriptionCreateParams.payment_settings.payment_method_options.check_scan`, and `SubscriptionUpdateParams.payment_settings.payment_method_options.check_scan`
  * Add support for `payment_evaluations` on `PaymentAttemptRecordReportGuaranteedParams`, `PaymentRecordReportPaymentAttemptGuaranteedParams`, `PaymentRecordReportPaymentAttemptParams.guaranteed`, and `PaymentRecordReportPaymentParams.guaranteed`
  * Add support for `location` on `PaymentIntentConfirmParams.payment_details`, `PaymentIntentCreateParams.payment_details`, `PaymentIntentUpdateParams.payment_details`, `SetupIntentConfirmParams.setup_details`, `SetupIntentCreateParams.setup_details`, and `SetupIntentUpdateParams.setup_details`
  * Add support for `onboarding_data_update_acknowledged` on `PaymentLocationUpdateParams`
  * Change `PaymentLocationCreateParams.address.country` and `PaymentLocationUpdateParams.address.country` to be optional
  * Add support for `customer` on `Radar.CustomerEvaluationUpdateParams`
  * Add support for `status` on `Radar.CustomerEvaluationUpdateParams` and `Radar.CustomerEvaluation`
  * Change `Radar.CustomerEvaluationUpdateParams.type` to be optional
  * Add support for `payment_behavior` on `SubscriptionResumeParams`
  * Add support for `dispute_details` on `V2.MoneyManagement.ReceivedDebit`
  * ⚠️ Add support for new value `debit_dispute` on enums `V2.MoneyManagement.Transaction.category` and `V2.MoneyManagement.TransactionEntry.transaction_details.category`
  * Add support for `debit_dispute` on `V2.MoneyManagement.Transaction.flow` and `V2.MoneyManagement.TransactionEntry.transaction_details.flow`
  * ⚠️ Add support for new value `debit_dispute` on enums `V2.MoneyManagement.Transaction.flow.type` and `V2.MoneyManagement.TransactionEntry.transaction_details.flow.type`
  * Add support for `payment_attempt_record` on `EventsV2PaymentsOffSessionPaymentAttemptFailedEvent` and `EventsV2PaymentsOffSessionPaymentFailedEvent`
  * Add support for event notifications `V2MoneyManagementFinancialAccountStatementCreatedEvent` and `V2MoneyManagementFinancialAccountStatementRestatedEvent` with related object `V2.MoneyManagement.FinancialAccountStatement`

See [the changelog for more details](https://github.com/stripe/stripe-node/blob/v22.2.0-alpha.5/CHANGELOG.md).

releases.body:
## `better-auth`

### Bug Fixes

- Added an error code to the `change-email-disabled` response to help clients identify the rejection reason ([#8948](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/8948))
- Fixed access-control role statement types so predefined organization roles expose only their configured permissions in TypeScript ([#9507](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9507))
- Fixed the anonymous plugin to correctly call `onLinkAccount` when email verification triggers auto sign-in ([#9548](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9548))
- Fixed device authorization to bind pending codes to the verifying session, preventing any authenticated user from approving or denying another user's device code ([#9573](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9573))
- Fixed a race condition in the magic-link plugin that allowed concurrent requests to mint multiple sessions from the same single-use token ([#9572](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9572))
- Fixed the `oidc-provider` and `mcp` plugins to require `client_secret` for confidential clients on refresh token grants and use constant-time secret comparison ([#9576](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9576))
- Hardened `oidc-provider` and `mcp` plugins to follow OAuth 2.1: removed `"none"` from advertised signing algorithms, defaulted plain PKCE off, and rejected incomplete PKCE parameters ([#9575](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9575))
- Fixed an invitation takeover vulnerability by enabling `requireEmailVerificationOnInvitation` by default and extending the verification gate to `getInvitation` and `listUserInvitations` ([#9577](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9577))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/f41514ef07cfafc5dbf463bd1500aee6575d88a7/packages/better-auth/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/oauth-provider`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed a race condition in the OAuth authorization-code grant that allowed concurrent token-exchange requests to mint multiple token sets from the same authorization code
- Fixed a race condition in OAuth refresh-token rotation that allowed concurrent requests to fork refresh token families, and added a `unique` constraint on `oauthRefreshToken.token`
- Fixed OAuth account linking to require a verified local email before linking an OAuth identity to a local account ([#9578](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9578))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/f41514ef07cfafc5dbf463bd1500aee6575d88a7/packages/oauth-provider/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/core`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed an invalid import list in the instrumentation module ([#9582](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9582))
- Widened `advanced.ipAddress.ipv6Subnet` to accept any valid IPv6 prefix length (0-128) instead of a narrow set of values ([#9545](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9545))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/f41514ef07cfafc5dbf463bd1500aee6575d88a7/packages/core/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/scim`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed session cleanup to run when admin, anonymous, or SCIM operations delete a user ([#9162](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9162))
- Fixed `generateSCIMToken` to reject `providerId` values that collide with built-in account providers, preventing tokens from authenticating against unintended accounts ([#9579](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9579))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/f41514ef07cfafc5dbf463bd1500aee6575d88a7/packages/scim/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/sso`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed SSO provider registration to require an org admin or owner role, preventing any organization member from registering providers ([#9220](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9220))
- Fixed an SSRF vulnerability by validating user-supplied OIDC endpoint URLs against a public-routable host allowlist at provider registration and update ([#9574](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9574))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/f41514ef07cfafc5dbf463bd1500aee6575d88a7/packages/sso/CHANGELOG.md)

## `auth`

### Features

- Added an atomic `claimOne` adapter primitive for consuming database rows without race conditions ([#9560](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9560))

### Bug Fixes

- Renamed the `claimOne` adapter primitive to `consumeOne` and added `internalAdapter.consumeVerificationValue` for atomically consuming verification rows ([#9568](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9568))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/f41514ef07cfafc5dbf463bd1500aee6575d88a7/packages/cli/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/api-key`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed API key rate-limited responses to return HTTP 429 instead of 401, so clients can distinguish throttling from authentication failures ([#9505](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9505))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/f41514ef07cfafc5dbf463bd1500aee6575d88a7/packages/api-key/CHANGELOG.md)

## Contributors

Thanks to everyone who contributed to this release:

@dipan-ck, @GautamBytes, @gustavovalverde, @Kvizas, @ping-maxwell, @stewartjarod

**Full changelog:** [`v1.6.10...v1.6.11`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/compare/v1.6.10...v1.6.11)

releases.name: v1.7.0-beta.3
releases.body:
## `better-auth`

### Features

- Made the `Auth` instance directly fetchable ([#9431](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9431))
- Added `hydrateSession` to seed the client with a server-fetched session so `useSession` returns data on the first render ([#8733](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/8733))
- Added an immutable username option that locks a username after it is first set, while still allowing other profile fields to be updated ([#9240](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9240))

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed organization invitation roles to support dynamic values ([#9437](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9437))
- Fixed link accessibility issues ([#9521](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9521))
- Fixed incorrect email casing in one-tap, email-OTP, and email-verification flows ([#9369](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9369))
- Fixed the OpenAPI schema for `POST /sign-in/social` which incorrectly declared required fields ([#9268](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9268))
- Added a warning when the cookie plugin is placed last in the plugins array ([#9484](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9484))
- Fixed `useSession` to revalidate correctly after admin impersonation ([#9402](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9402))
- Fixed duplicate `Set-Cookie` headers being sent on redirect responses ([#9497](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9497))
- Fixed the bearer plugin to write only one entry per cookie name when merging session tokens ([#9387](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9387))
- Fixed the captcha plugin breaking the email-OTP flow ([#8339](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/8339))
- Fixed instrumentation resolution in the adapter factory via package self-reference ([#9340](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9340))
- Fixed instrumentation to use the pure entry point in Cloudflare Workers environments ([#9395](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9395))
- Fixed enumeration protection to apply correctly when `autoSignIn` is disabled ([#8839](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/8839))
- Fixed a `TypeError` caused by non-ASCII characters in an OAuth `error_description` during redirect ([#9065](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9065))
- Fixed the `deleteAccount` parameter name from `accountId` to `id` in the internal adapter ([#9503](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9503))
- Fixed OAuth callbacks to reject responses that are missing a provider account ID ([#9456](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9456))
- Fixed `mapProfileToUser` to serve as a fallback for OAuth providers that may omit the email field ([#9331](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9331))
- Fixed `beforeCreateTeam` and `beforeCreateInvitation` hooks to allow passing a custom `id` ([#9253](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9253))
- Fixed `cancelPendingInvitationsOnReInvite` being unreachable because re-invite incorrectly returned 400 ([#9453](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9453))
- Fixed a `TS2742` error by re-exporting field types when using `additionalFields` ([#9349](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9349))
- Fixed the active organization role not being refreshed on sign-out ([#9440](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9440))
- Fixed `setActiveTeam` to correctly scope team selection to the active organization ([#9239](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9239))
- Fixed a missing `getNonce` client alias in the SIWE plugin ([#9461](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9461))
- Fixed the username plugin to respect `callbackURL` on sign-in ([#9475](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9475))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/4839a2d761ac52071ac49fa7545a00e6221cb823/packages/better-auth/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/stripe`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed `onSubscriptionUpdate` to expose the `stripeSubscription` object and corrected a stale snapshot issue ([#9354](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9354))
- Fixed library-owned Checkout Session fields to no longer be overridable via `getCheckoutSessionParams` ([#9481](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9481))
- Fixed `onSubscriptionDeleted` and trial callbacks to receive the post-update subscription instead of the stale one ([#9356](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9356))
- Fixed `getCheckoutSessionParams` to preserve `freeTrial` and internal metadata during merging ([#9474](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9474))
- Renamed internal subscription webhook variables for improved clarity ([#9355](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9355))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/4839a2d761ac52071ac49fa7545a00e6221cb823/packages/stripe/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/oauth-provider`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed authorization flows to work correctly when no `state` parameter is provided ([#9328](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9328))
- Fixed missing exports for declaration helper types ([#9406](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9406))
- Fixed `prompt=login` to be honored correctly throughout the consent continuation flow ([#9344](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9344))
- Fixed missing database indexes on OAuth foreign keys ([#9389](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9389))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/4839a2d761ac52071ac49fa7545a00e6221cb823/packages/oauth-provider/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/passkey`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed unhandled failures during the passkey autofill ceremony ([#9429](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9429))
- Fixed a TypeScript `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` incompatibility in the passkey plugin ([#9270](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9270))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/4839a2d761ac52071ac49fa7545a00e6221cb823/packages/passkey/CHANGELOG.md)

## `auth`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed the CLI to emit valid Kysely initialization configs ([#9455](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9455))
- Improved CLI auth config loading by using `c12` v4's `resolveModule` for more reliable module resolution ([#9477](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9477))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/4839a2d761ac52071ac49fa7545a00e6221cb823/packages/cli/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/api-key`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed `api.verifyApiKey` to correctly validate keys against the `configId` ([#9393](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9393))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/4839a2d761ac52071ac49fa7545a00e6221cb823/packages/api-key/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/i18n`

### Features

- Added built-in translations for 22 languages ([#9157](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9157))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/4839a2d761ac52071ac49fa7545a00e6221cb823/packages/i18n/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/sso`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed `spMetadata` to use `findSAMLProvider` so that the default SSO configuration works correctly ([#9398](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9398))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/4839a2d761ac52071ac49fa7545a00e6221cb823/packages/sso/CHANGELOG.md)

## Contributors

Thanks to everyone who contributed to this release:

@adrianmxb, @baptisteArno, @bytaesu, @Craga89, @cyphercodes, @dipan-ck, @erquhart, @GautamBytes, @gustavovalverde, @IcanDivideBy0, @jaydeep-pipaliya, @mausic, @onmax, @pi0, @ping-maxwell, @sovetski, @zllovesuki

**Full changelog:** [`v1.7.0-beta.2...v1.7.0-beta.3`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/compare/v1.7.0-beta.2...v1.7.0-beta.3)

releases.body:
## `better-auth`

### Bug Fixes

- Exposed `refreshUserSessions` on the internal adapter ([#7764](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/7764))
- Fixed organization invitation roles to accept dynamic access control roles ([#9437](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9437))
- Improved link accessibility ([#9521](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9521))
- Fixed incorrect email casing in one-tap, email-otp, and email-verification flows ([#9369](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9369))
- Fixed OpenAPI schema for `POST /sign-in/social` mis-declaring required fields ([#9268](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9268))
- Added a warning when the cookie plugin is placed last in the plugins array ([#9484](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9484))
- Fixed `useSession` not revalidating after admin impersonation starts or stops ([#9402](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9402))
- Fixed duplicate `Set-Cookie` headers being emitted on redirect responses from social sign-in and magic-link endpoints ([#9497](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9497))
- Fixed the bearer plugin writing duplicate cookie entries when merging the session token into request headers ([#9387](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9387))
- Fixed captcha plugin breaking the email-otp flow ([#8339](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/8339))
- Fixed email enumeration protection not applying when `emailAndPassword.autoSignIn` is false ([#8839](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/8839))
- Fixed a `TypeError` caused by non-ASCII characters in OAuth error descriptions on redirect ([#9065](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9065))
- Renamed `internalAdapter.deleteAccount` parameter from `accountId` to `id` to reflect that it queries by primary key ([#9503](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9503))
- Fixed OAuth callbacks accepting a missing provider account ID, which could link accounts under an `undefined` id ([#9456](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9456))
- Fixed `cancelPendingInvitationsOnReInvite` having no effect, where re-inviting the same email always returned `USER_IS_ALREADY_INVITED_TO_THIS_ORGANIZATION` ([#9453](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9453))
- Fixed a TS2742 type error caused by missing re-exports when using `additionalFields` in the organization plugin ([#9349](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9349))
- Fixed `useActiveMemberRole` retaining a previous user's role after sign-out in SPA flows ([#9440](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9440))
- Fixed `setActiveTeam` to only accept teams from the currently active organization ([#9239](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9239))
- Added `authClient.siwe.getNonce()` as a compatibility alias for the SIWE nonce endpoint ([#9461](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9461))
- Fixed `callbackURL` being ignored on `signIn.username`, so it now redirects correctly like `signIn.email` ([#9475](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9475))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/698678bcd08e0552661f9ae306b031674e588a2c/packages/better-auth/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/oauth-provider`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed `sessionId` typing in refresh token types to be optional, matching the schema ([#9324](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9324))
- Fixed stale `prompt=login` consent continuations not completing after a forced login
- Exported OAuth provider helper types needed for portable downstream TypeScript declaration emit ([#9406](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9406))
- Fixed `prompt=login` not being honored after consent continuation, preventing session bypass ([#9344](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9344))
- Added database indexes to OAuth provider foreign-key fields in generated schemas ([#9389](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9389))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/698678bcd08e0552661f9ae306b031674e588a2c/packages/oauth-provider/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/stripe`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed `onSubscriptionUpdate` to receive the raw `stripeSubscription` object, and fixed `onSubscriptionCancel` to receive the post-update subscription row instead of a stale snapshot ([#9354](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9354))
- Fixed `getCheckoutSessionParams` overriding internally managed Stripe Checkout Session fields such as `success_url`, `cancel_url`, `customer`, and `line_items` ([#9481](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9481))
- Fixed `onSubscriptionDeleted`, `onTrialEnd`, and `onTrialExpired` receiving a stale pre-update subscription snapshot instead of the post-update row ([#9356](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9356))
- Fixed `getCheckoutSessionParams` overriding free trial and internal metadata, which could hide trial periods and create duplicate subscription rows on webhook ([#9474](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9474))
- Renamed internal subscription webhook variables for clarity ([#9355](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9355))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/698678bcd08e0552661f9ae306b031674e588a2c/packages/stripe/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/api-key`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed `api.verifyApiKey` not validating the key's `configId` against the request body ([#9393](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/pull/9393))

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/698678bcd08e0552661f9ae306b031674e588a2c/packages/api-key/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/core`

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/698678bcd08e0552661f9ae306b031674e588a2c/packages/core/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/passkey`

### Bug Fixes

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/698678bcd08e0552661f9ae306b031674e588a2c/packages/passkey/CHANGELOG.md)

## `@better-auth/sso`

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/698678bcd08e0552661f9ae306b031674e588a2c/packages/sso/CHANGELOG.md)

For detailed changes, see [`CHANGELOG`](https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/blob/698678bcd08e0552661f9ae306b031674e588a2c/packages/cli/CHANGELOG.md)

releases.name: v1.0.0-rc.2
releases.body:
### Updates

- Disabled default codec type selectors for custom columns (fixes [#5711](https://github.com/drizzle-team/drizzle-orm/issues/5711))
- Сallback type overload for codec selector in custom pg columns (`codec: (config) => config?.withTimeZone ? 'timestamptz' : 'timestamp'`)
- Extended list of postgis types for codecs (improvement for [#5711](https://github.com/drizzle-team/drizzle-orm/issues/5711))
- Updated codecs: `geometry` -> `geometry(point)`, `geometry:tuple` -> `geometry(point):tuple`
- Switched PG transactions from class properties back to class methods (fixes [#5709](https://github.com/drizzle-team/drizzle-orm/issues/5709))
- Updated `AWS Data Api` codecs, removed query typings, improved input param mapping  
- Removed prepared query `typings` field from all builders    
- Added `column` argument to `CastParam`,`CastArrayParam` codecs

### Migration updates in SQLite

- Added migration conflict detection for SQLite. When migration history has multiple open branches, `drizzle-kit generate` now checks whether those branches can be merged safely before creating the next migration. This helps catch cases where two migrations were created from the same parent and then changed the same SQLite object in incompatible ways, for example two branches changing the same table, index, or view.

```bash
npx drizzle-kit generate
```

- If the conflict is expected and you want to continue anyway, pass `--ignore-conflicts` to skip the conflict check for that command.

```bash
npx drizzle-kit generate --ignore-conflicts
npx drizzle-kit check --ignore-conflicts
```

- Added proper SQLite migration tree merging. New snapshots now collect all open leaf snapshot IDs and write them as parents, instead of keeping only one latest parent. This means a new migration generated after branching can merge all open leaves and use the combined SQLite state for the next snapshot diff.

```json
{
  "prevIds": ["first-open-leaf-id", "second-open-leaf-id"]
}
```

- Fixed `DrizzleQueryError` and `TransactionRollbackError` constructors to properly set the error name for better instanceof checks
- Fixed error handling in aws-data-api to properly show database error messages

releases.name: @ai-sdk/xai@3.0.85
releases.body:
### Patch Changes

-   a727da4: chore: ensure consistent import handling and avoid import duplicates or cycles

-   fa6e62b: feat(provider/xai): support non-image file parts (PDF, text, CSV) in the Responses API via `input_file` + `file_url`

    The xAI Responses API accepts `{ type: 'input_file', file_url }` for non-image documents (see <https://docs.x.ai/docs/guides/chat-with-files>), but the AI SDK xAI Responses provider previously threw `UnsupportedFunctionalityError` for any file part whose `mediaType` did not start with `image/`.

    When a file part is passed with `data: URL` and a non-image media type, the provider now emits `{ type: 'input_file', file_url }`. `application/pdf` and `text/*` are also added to `supportedUrls` so the SDK does not download them to bytes before reaching the converter.

    Inline-byte (base64) inputs for non-image media types continue to throw, since xAI's Responses API requires either a public URL or a pre-uploaded `file_id` for non-image documents.

-   Updated dependencies [a727da4]
    -   @ai-sdk/openai-compatible@2.0.43
    -   @ai-sdk/provider-utils@4.0.25
    -   @ai-sdk/provider@3.0.10
